name: Peanut Pie
recipeInstructions:
From "A Taste of the South" by Terry Thompson (HP Books; 1988).
1. Beat eggs, corn syrup, sugar, peanut butter, and vanilla until smooth and thickened, about 4 minutes.
2. Stir in peanuts and blend well.
3. Roll out pastry to fit a 9-inch pie pan.
4. Pour filling into the prepared pie crust.
5. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, about 30-35 minutes.
7. Cool completely before serving.
8. Top each slice with whipped cream.
Makes 8 servings.
Each serving contains about: 583 calories; 118 milligrams sodium; 122 milligrams cholesterol; 34 grams fat; 62 grams carbohydrates; 13 grams protein; 1.38 grams fiber.
